name: feature-env
description: A TypeScript-first package for validating environment variables by feature, route, or module.

scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const required=['dist/index.js','dist/index.d.ts'];const missing=required.filter((p)=>!fs.existsSync(p));if(missing.length){console.error('Build output check failed. Missing:',missing.join(', '));process.exit(1);}console.log('Build output verified.');"
scripts.postbuild:test: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const required=['.test-dist/test/legacy.test.js','.test-dist/test/define-env.test.js','.test-dist/test/require-env.test.js'];const missing=required.filter((p)=>!fs.existsSync(p));if(missing.length){console.error('Test build output check failed. Missing:',missing.join(', '));process.exit(1);}console.log('Test build output verified.');"
scripts.test: npm run build:test && node .test-dist/test/legacy.test.js && node .test-dist/test/define-env.test.js && node .test-dist/test/require-env.test.js

author: JomsCode21
